nasb.text: When the sons of Ammon fought against Israel, the elders of Gilead went to get Jephthah from the land of Tob;

esv.text: And when the Ammonites made war against Israel, the elders of Gilead went to bring Jephthah from the land of Tob.

cnv.text: 亞捫人與以色列人爭戰的時候，基列的眾長老就去，把耶弗他從陀伯請回來。

ccb.text: 基列的众长老就去陀伯请耶弗他，
